user.title: Price source
user.description: Select the Nord Pool entity that represents the current electricity price for your area.

data_description.nordpool_prices_sensor: Choose the Nord Pool current-price entity. If several Nord Pool sensors exist, pick the one ending in `current_price`.

supplier_fees_and_credits.title: Supplier fees and credits
supplier_fees_and_credits.description: Add supplier-specific import fees and export credits. Leave unused fields empty or at zero.

data.supplier_note: Notes on supplier fees and credits.

data_description.supplier_note: Optional note describing what is included in the supplier pricing.
data_description.supplier_fixed_fee: Fixed supplier markup added per imported kWh.
data_description.supplier_variable_fee: Percentage supplier markup applied to the spot price on import.
data_description.supplier_fixed_credit: Fixed supplier credit received per exported kWh.
data_description.supplier_variable_credit: Percentage supplier credit applied to the spot price on export.

grid_fees_and_credits.title: Grid fees and credits
grid_fees_and_credits.description: Add grid-specific import fees and export credits. Leave unused fields empty or at zero.

data.grid_note: Notes on grid fees and credits.

data_description.grid_note: Optional note describing what is included in the grid pricing.
data_description.grid_fixed_fee: Fixed grid fee added per imported kWh.
data_description.grid_variable_fee: Percentage grid markup applied to the spot price on import.
data_description.grid_fixed_credit: Fixed grid credit received per exported kWh.
data_description.grid_variable_credit: Percentage grid credit applied to the spot price on export.

taxes_and_vat.title: Taxes and VAT
taxes_and_vat.description: Add statutory taxes that should be included in the final electricity cost.

data_description.grid_energy_tax: Energy tax added per imported kWh.
data_description.electricity_vat: VAT percentage applied to the import cost after fees and taxes.

thresholds.title: Price thresholds
thresholds.description: Set the thresholds used to classify prices as Low, Medium, or High.

data_description.low_threshold: Prices below this total import cost are classified as Low.
data_description.high_threshold: Prices above this total import cost are classified as High.

solar_forecast.title: Solar forecast
solar_forecast.description: Configure optional solar inputs for bias-corrected production forecasts. Leave these fields empty to skip solar forecasting.

data_description.forecast_entity: Sensor that provides today's solar forecast.
data_description.power_entity: Measured inverter AC power in watts, used to refine the forecast.
data_description.forecast_tomorrow_entity: Optional sensor that provides tomorrow's solar forecast.

battery.title: Battery and planner inputs
battery.description: Configure current battery timing values and optional planner sensors. Leave any field empty if that input is not available yet.

data_description.battery_capacity_kwh: Usable battery capacity. Set together with max charge power to override the default timing assumptions.
data_description.battery_max_charge_power_w: Maximum battery charge power. Set together with battery capacity.
data_description.battery_degradation_cost: Minimum price spread required before the battery is cycled.
data_description.battery_soc_entity: Sensor reporting the current battery state of charge in percent.
data_description.battery_charge_power_entity: Sensor reporting live battery charge power for validation and later learning.
data_description.grid_import_entity: Sensor reporting power currently imported from the grid.
data_description.grid_export_entity: Sensor reporting power currently exported to the grid.
data_description.outdoor_temperature_entity: Optional outdoor temperature sensor for future heating and load estimation.
data_description.household_base_load_w: Fallback estimate of the household's non-flexible base load in watts.
data_description.water_heater_power_entity: Sensor reporting current water-heater power, used to track reheating after hot-water use.
data_description.water_heater_power_w: Approximate full-power draw of the water heater in watts.
data_description.water_heater_max_hours: Worst-case refill time after heavy hot-water use.
data_description.bathroom_humidity_entity: Bathroom humidity sensor used to detect shower events.
data_description.pool_pump_power_w: Approximate full-power draw of the pool pump in watts.
data_description.dehumidifier_power_w: Approximate full-power draw of the dehumidifier in watts.

error.invalid_sensor: The selected sensor is not available or not valid.
error.low_threshold_higher_than_high_threshold: The lower threshold must be less than the upper threshold.
error.entity_not_found: Entity not found – check the entity ID and try again.
error.solar_entity_required: Both forecast sensor and power sensor must be provided together.
error.battery_setting_required: Battery capacity and max charge power must be provided together.

init.title: Edit settings
init.description: Review price inputs, solar sources, battery timings, and optional planner sensors.
